entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary crop discussed, subjected to various biological constraints.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the groundnut crop, which can be reduced by pathogens and pests.

entities.name: FUNGAL PATHOGENS
entities.description: Fungi that cause diseases such as leaf spots and rust in groundnuts.

entities.name: LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A fungal disease that reduces groundnut yields.

entities.name: RUST
entities.description: A fungal disease that reduces groundnut yields.

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: A toxin-producing fungus that reduces groundnut yield and quality.

entities.name: CROP QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the groundnut crop, affected by Aspergillus flavus.

entities.name: VIRUSES
entities.description: Viral agents that can be devastating to groundnut crops during epidemics.

entities.name: BACTERIAL DISEASE
entities.description: Economically important diseases caused by bacteria in groundnuts.

entities.name: PSEUDOMONAS SOLANACEARUM
entities.description: The bacterium responsible for an economically important bacterial disease in groundnuts.

entities.name: PESTS
entities.description: Organisms that attack groundnuts, though few cause consistent worldwide yield losses.

entities.name: APHIDS
entities.description: Global pests that serve as vectors for several important viruses.

entities.name: THRIPS
entities.description: Pests that generally do not cause serious direct yield losses.

entities.name: FRANKINIELLA SCHULTZEI
entities.description: A species of thrips that is the main vector of bud necrosis virus in India.

entities.name: BUD NECROSIS VIRUS
entities.description: A virus transmitted by Frankiniella schultzei in India.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where Frankiniella schultzei and bud necrosis virus are significant.

entities.name: LEAFHOPPERS
entities.description: Local pests that can be serious to groundnut production.

entities.name: MILLIPEDES
entities.description: Local pests that can be serious to groundnut production.

entities.name: LEAF MINERS
entities.description: Local pests that can be serious to groundnut production.

entities.name: SUCKING BUGS
entities.description: Local pests that can be serious to groundnut production.

entities.name: HOST-PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: A strategy utilized to overcome serious yield reducers in groundnuts.

entities.name: INTEGRATED MANAGEMENT SCHEMES
entities.description: A strategy utilized to overcome serious yield reducers in groundnuts.

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The process of nitrogen fixation in groundnuts, which can be poor due to inefficient strains or techniques.

entities.name: NATIVE STRAINS
entities.description: Local bacterial strains whose inefficiency can lead to poor nodulation.

entities.name: APPLICATION TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques for applying inputs that, if poor, lead to poor nodulation.
